frontend-developer.name: frontend-developer
frontend-developer.description: React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, CSS/Tailwind, responsive design, accessibility, performance optimization, component architecture.

backend-developer.name: backend-developer
backend-developer.description: API design (REST/GraphQL/gRPC), database integration, authentication (JWT/OAuth/RBAC), caching, message queues, microservices.

fullstack-developer.name: fullstack-developer
fullstack-developer.description: End-to-end app building with Next.js/Nuxt, database design, API integration, authentication, deployment, rapid prototyping.

devops-engineer.name: devops-engineer
devops-engineer.description: CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, monitoring (Prometheus/Grafana), logging, cloud platforms.

mobile-developer.name: mobile-developer
mobile-developer.description: React Native, Flutter, Swift/SwiftUI, Kotlin/Jetpack Compose, cross-platform architecture, offline-first, push notifications.

qa-test-engineer.name: qa-test-engineer
qa-test-engineer.description: TDD/BDD, unit testing (Jest/Vitest), E2E testing (Playwright/Cypress), load testing (k6), test automation, CI pipelines.

data-engineer.name: data-engineer
data-engineer.description: ETL/ELT pipelines (Airflow/dbt), data warehousing (Snowflake/BigQuery), stream processing (Kafka), data quality.

security-engineer.name: security-engineer
security-engineer.description: OWASP Top 10, secure code review, authentication hardening, cryptography, dependency scanning, secrets management, threat modeling.

system-architect.name: system-architect
system-architect.description: System design, scalability patterns, distributed systems, DDD/CQRS/Event Sourcing, ADR, capacity planning.

tech-lead.name: tech-lead
tech-lead.description: Code review, PR management, sprint planning, tech debt management, incident response, engineering metrics, mentoring.

ai-ml-engineer.name: ai-ml-engineer
ai-ml-engineer.description: ML pipelines, model training (PyTorch/TensorFlow), MLOps, LLM integration, RAG systems, vector databases, prompt engineering.

database-administrator.name: database-administrator
database-administrator.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, query optimization, index design, replication, backup/recovery, connection pooling.

cloud-architect.name: cloud-architect
cloud-architect.description: AWS/GCP/Azure, serverless (Lambda), Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CDK), networking, cost optimization, disaster recovery.

senior-java-developer.name: senior-java-developer
senior-java-developer.description: Spring Boot, microservices, JVM performance tuning, JPA/Hibernate, Spring Security, testing (JUnit 5/Mockito/Testcontainers), Maven/Gradle, design patterns.
